questions: What is Anthropic's current policy on trial credits and API key requirements for new signups as of June 2026?
Has Anthropic made any changes in the last 30 days to Claude model pricing or the Sonnet/Opus tier structure that would affect Pi-CEO orchestration costs?
What is the current Australian Business Register (ABR) API status and any known outages or authentication changes affecting ABN lookup in June 2026?
What competing AI-powered business intelligence or report-generation platforms have launched or updated their onboarding flows in the last 60 days that RestoreAssist should benchmark against?

findings.question: What is Anthropic's current policy on trial credits and API key requirements for new signups as of June 2026?
findings.claim: New API accounts at console.anthropic.com receive approximately $5 in free trial credits on signup with no credit card required; phone number verification is mandatory before API access is granted. The proposed June 15 billing change — which would have split Agent SDK, claude -p, and third-party app usage into a separate monthly credit pool — was paused and did not take effect; subscription usage continues drawing from existing Pro/Max/Team/Enterprise pools unchanged.

sources.title: Claude Credit Overhaul 2026: Anthropic Pauses the June 15 Change
sources.excerpt: The planned move of Agent SDK, claude -p, and third-party app usage to a separate monthly credit is not taking effect. Anthropic is reworking the plan and will provide advance notice before implementing any revised version.

sources.title: How to Get a Free Anthropic API Key in 2026 (Plus Free Credits)
sources.excerpt: New accounts receive ~$5 in free trial credits. No credit card required to start. Phone verification is mandatory before accessing the API and credits.

findings.question: Has Anthropic made any changes in the last 30 days to Claude model pricing or the Sonnet/Opus tier structure that would affect Pi-CEO orchestration costs?
findings.claim: No per-token price changes to Sonnet or Opus in the last 30 days. Current API rates are Claude Sonnet 4.6 at $3.00/$15.00 per 1M input/output tokens and Claude Opus 4.8 at $5.00/$25.00 per 1M tokens; the 1M-token context window is now included at standard per-token pricing with no premium surcharge. The paused June 15 Agent SDK billing split means Pi-CEO orchestration costs on subscription plans remain unchanged.

sources.title: Current Anthropic Claude API Pricing 2026: Opus, Sonnet & Haiku Costs
sources.excerpt: Sonnet 4.6: $3/$15 per 1M tokens. Opus 4.8: $5/$25 per 1M tokens. 1M context window now included at standard per-token rates — previously a premium feature.

sources.title: Claude Credit Overhaul 2026: Anthropic Pauses the June 15 Change
sources.excerpt: Agent SDK billing split paused; Anthropic reworking the plan. Current subscription pools unchanged. No new per-token rate changes announced alongside the pause.

findings.question: What is the current Australian Business Register (ABR) API status and any known outages or authentication changes affecting ABN lookup in June 2026?
findings.claim: The ABR API — covering ABN System, ABR Web Services, and Identifier Search — is fully operational as of June 19 2026 with no incidents, outages, or authentication changes recorded at any point in June 2026.

sources.title: Australian Business Register Status
sources.excerpt: All Systems Operational. No incidents reported today. Incident history shows clean records across ABN System, ABR Web Services, and Identifier Search throughout June 2026.

findings.question: What competing AI-powered business intelligence or report-generation platforms have launched or updated their onboarding flows in the last 60 days that RestoreAssist should benchmark against?
findings.claim: Two notable launches in the April–June 2026 window: Sakana AI opened a closed beta (≈300 professionals across financial institutions and consulting firms) for an 'ultra deep research' agent producing 100+ page reports in ~8 hours; and Perplexity launched its 'Computer' enterprise AI agent routing proprietary Snowflake data and legal contracts for BI use cases, targeting Microsoft and Salesforce enterprise buyers. Specific onboarding-flow UX details were not available from indexed sources.

sources.title: Sakana AI launches ultra deep research agent for 100+ page reports in 8 hours | VentureBeat
sources.excerpt: Sakana AI ran a closed beta beginning April 2026 with ~300 professionals at financial institutions, consulting firms, and think tanks for its long-form report generation agent.

sources.title: Perplexity takes its 'Computer' AI agent into the enterprise, taking aim at Microsoft and Salesforce | VentureBeat
sources.excerpt: Perplexity's Computer enterprise agent routes Snowflake data, legal contracts, and proprietary business intelligence for enterprise customers — launched for enterprise in early 2026.

open_questions: What exact date will Anthropic implement its revised Agent SDK billing plan after the June 15 2026 pause — no revised timeline published as of June 19 2026.

Are there specific onboarding-flow UX details (step count, free-trial gate, friction benchmarks) for Sakana AI ultra deep research or Perplexity Computer enterprise? Primary VentureBeat articles were rate-limited; only search-result excerpts retrieved.

Are there Australian disaster-recovery or insurance-vertical AI report-generation tools (beyond general BI platforms) that updated onboarding in this window? No indexed sources found at this specificity level.
